name: ecluse-bench-corpus
description: Pinned real-world npm packument corpus for the Layer A/B benchmarks (docs/architecture/performance.md). Each dependency pins, by package@version, a real package whose full packument is captured into bench/corpus/npm/*.full.json by `make gen-bench-corpus`. The captures span the small->heavy size/shape spectrum so the benches sample the real distribution rather than one anchor plus a synthetic. NOT installed (no node_modules, no lockfile): the version strings are capture pins, not a build dependency. Renovate's npm manager keeps the pins fresh the same way it keeps test/oracles fresh; a bump is the signal to re-capture.
